ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time_eastern" TEXT /* Time of the game in Eastern time */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "leagues" TEXT /* List of leagues that are part of the season */,
  "total_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games scheduled for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the player has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with this result */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the visiting team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the game */,
  "attendance_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which tickets were sold */,
  "ticket_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of tickets sold (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the tickets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
